track.label: Track
track.commentEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first!

browse.excludeHint: Click on a genre to exclude it from results

home.hero: Your AI music collection. Listen, create playlists, and enjoy the sound.
home.uploadHint: Upload tracks via the admin panel

favorites.title: ❤️ Favorites
favorites.empty: You have no favorite tracks yet

settings.title: Settings
settings.waveformHint: Show waveform instead of linear progress

admin.title: Control panel
admin.uploadValidation: Fill in the title, artist, and select an audio file
admin.siteUrlDesc: Will be written into comment and url tags of downloaded files
admin.staticMetaDesc: Added to all downloadable tracks. Dynamic tags (title, artist, genre) are assigned automatically.
admin.dynamicMetaDesc: These tags are added automatically from track data:

cookie.title: 🍪 Cookie usage
cookie.text1: We use essential data (localStorage) for authentication and saving your settings.
cookie.text2: Additional data helps us improve the service (remembering interface state).

extension.title: 🧩 Chrome Extension
extension.subtitle: Mini-player right in your browser. Listen to music without an open tab — like a real desktop app.
extension.howToInstallHint: 6 simple steps — takes less than a minute
extension.compatibilityHint: Works in all Chromium browsers (Manifest V3)
extension.feat_bg_desc: Music plays even when the popup is closed. Mini-player always on the browser panel.
extension.feat_playlists_desc: Browse your and public playlists right from the extension.
extension.feat_genres_desc: Filter tracks by genre right from the extension.
extension.feat_top_desc: Most popular tracks always at hand.
extension.feat_favs_desc: Sign in and listen to your favorite tracks.
extension.feat_radio_desc: Automatically plays the next track. Endless music.
extension.feat_shuffle_desc: Random order — a new playlist every time.
extension.feat_search_desc: Quick search by title and artist.
extension.step1_desc: Click the button above — a ZIP archive with extension files will download.
extension.step2_desc: Extract the downloaded musicbox-extension.zip to a convenient folder.
extension.step3_desc: Go to chrome://extensions or click ⋮ → Extensions → Manage Extensions
extension.step4_desc: In the top right corner, toggle the 'Developer mode' switch
extension.step5_desc: Click 'Load unpacked' and select the folder with the files
extension.step6_desc: The 🎵 icon will appear on the browser panel. Pin it for quick access.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: This Privacy Policy describes what data we collect when you use the MusicBox service (musicbox.gornich.fun), how we use and protect it. By using the service, you agree to the terms of this Policy.
privacy.s2_1_password: Password — stored in encrypted form (hash). We do not store passwords in plain text and have no access to them.
privacy.s2_1_comments: Comments — text of comments left on tracks.
privacy.s2_2_stats: Listening and download statistics — aggregated counters not linked to a specific user.
privacy.s3_text: We do not use cookies. Instead, your browser's localStorage mechanism is used to store:
privacy.s3_token_desc: JWT authorization token for maintaining the session
privacy.s3_user_desc: Profile data (name, settings) for displaying the interface
privacy.s3_sidebar_desc: Remembering filter state in the sidebar
privacy.s3_note: Essential data is always stored for the correct operation of the service. Functional data is stored only with your consent and improves usability.
privacy.s4_1: To ensure the operation of the service and authorization.
privacy.s5_text: We do not share your data with third parties, do not sell it, and do not provide access to advertising networks or analytics services. The site does not use third-party trackers, pixels, or analytics scripts.
privacy.s6_1: Passwords are stored as cryptographic hashes.
privacy.s6_2: Connection to the service is protected by HTTPS.
privacy.s6_3: JWT tokens have a limited validity period.
privacy.s6_4: Database access is restricted and protected.
privacy.s7_1: Withdraw consent — clear localStorage in your browser settings or click 'Essential only' when the banner appears again.
privacy.s7_2: Delete account — contact the administrator for complete deletion of all your data.
privacy.s7_3: Obtain information — you can request what data is stored about you.
privacy.s7_4: Delete comments — you can delete your comments from track pages.
privacy.s8_text: We may update this Policy. For significant changes, we will notify users through the service interface. We recommend periodically checking the current version on this page.
privacy.s9_text: If you have questions about this Policy or the processing of your data, contact the service administrator.
